rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §253.167 governs population certification and campaign contribution limit notices for judicial candidates. The two provisions share no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 253.167. CERTIFICATION OF POPULATION; NOTICE OF CONTRIBUTION LIMITS.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this election code provision.
